findings.design_reference: final-round unresolved prior blocking finding; devops-operations lens / README native install entrypoint / specs/198-beta2-hardening/iterations/001 scope excludes bin/install shell mode changes
findings.comment: Final review round escalation: the prior blocking executable-bit regression is still present in .review/changes.diff (install.sh and bin/specrew* remain changed from 100755 to 100644, with shell integration tests also downgraded), and no worktree-visible human deferral in .review/process, specs/198-beta2-hardening, or the active iteration drift/quality artifacts covers it. Stop the autonomous review-fix loop and obtain a human decision: either restore executable bits for the Unix entrypoints/tests or record an explicit worktree-visible deferral naming this regression, the approving human, and where the work is carried.
